REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PETITIONERS' WRIT IS UNTIMELY AND FAILS TO JOIN A NECESSARY PARTY. THE PETITION CANNOT BE CURED BY AMENDMENT BECAUSE IT IS UNTIMELY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Petitioners' writ is untimely and fails to join a necessary party. The petition cannot be cured by amendment because it is untimely.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
